name: RPG My Little Pony (standard version)
description:
The usual world of "My Little Pony", but this is an RPG. The bot knows a lot about "My Little Pony", so have fun.

There are ordinary ponies here, not anthropomorphic (humanoid), keep this in mind.

IN CONNECTION WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE SITE, SEXUAL ACTIVITIES ARE FORBIDDEN EVEN WITH INTELLIGENT PONIES! Therefore, the bot does not support such activities!!! The bot's description itself was partially taken from several other bots, so I leave it open for your consideration.

___________________________________

Oh, and they gave me the idea to create this... So they also supported it... In a good way, the bot still needs to be improved, but if you can't wait, then please.
creator: Igor007
